ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position of the employee */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office where the employee is located */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the company */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "job_status" TEXT /* Job status of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the office is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the office is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the office */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the office */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the office */,
  "office_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the office */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office manager */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the position is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position's responsibilities */,
  "position_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the position */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade level of the position */,
  "reports_to" INTEGER /* Position ID of the supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., favorite, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "action_category" TEXT /* Category of the action */,
  "action_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "role_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the role */,
  "role_level" TEXT /* Level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_contacts_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "annual_salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the salary is paid */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the salary information was last updated */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of salary payments (e.g., monthly, bi-weekly) */,
  "salary_grade" INTEGER /* Grade level of the salary */,
  "increment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last salary increment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance evaluation */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance evaluation */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the employee's performance (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_period" TEXT /* Period for which the evaluation was done */,
  "evaluation_score" REAL /* Overall score of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_performance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the training was completed */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training (e.g., 2 hours, 1 day) */,
  "training_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training */,
  "training_cost" REAL /* Cost of the training */,
  "training_provider_rating" REAL /* Rating of the training provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit (e.g., Health Insurance, Retirement Plan) */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of the benefit (e.g., health, retirement) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit */,
  "benefit_cost" REAL /* Cost of the benefit */,
  "benefit_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_leaves" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., vacation, sick, personal) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the leave */,
  "leave_status" TEXT /* Status of the leave */,
  "leave_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the leave */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_leaves_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "review_category" TEXT /* Category of the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
